series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes requests for proposals, proposals, proposal evaluation materials, annual reports, correspondence to participating institutions and other related documents

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records may be scanned into the computer and then destroyed. Otherwise, retain for 3 years following the end of the award cycle, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years following the end of the award cycle, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
